trades.reason: overnight short, MC flipped to BUY + RSI 45
pivot to bull but MC whipsawed 74->26% in one cycle
heartbeat died while in profit, emergency sell worked
SELL flip 1B/5S — but should have exited at RSI 63 + MC 30% peak earlier for +76 SEK
RSI63+MC26% combined exit — best trade of day
BUY flip 7B>2S+4 — entered while monitor was dying
Manual sell — trusted signals 4 BUY vs 1 SELL, evening dip pattern played out
OPEN — overnight LONG, 7.2x leverage, barrier $65 (13% safe). Liberation Day tariff narrative bullish for metals.

lessons.lesson: MC whipsaws in ranging markets. P(up) can swing 80% to 26% in one 60s main loop cycle when signal votes are close (5B/4S vs 4B/5S = one vote flip).
lessons.fix: Require MC to hold above/below threshold for 2 consecutive checks before acting. Implemented in auto-fish v2.

lessons.lesson: Auto-fish needs heartbeat kill-switch. If the monitoring agent disconnects, the script keeps running blind with no one evaluating trades.
lessons.fix: Heartbeat file touched every 30s. If stale >120s: sell if in profit, hold if negative.

lessons.lesson: Both loops (main + metals) must agree on direction before entry. Metals loop updates independently and can disagree with main loop.
lessons.fix: Entry rule: action must match AND metals_action must match AND MC confirms AND RSI confirms. 4-gate entry.

lessons.lesson: Reading ALL available data makes monitoring intelligent. Main loop writes: 30-signal consensus, MC, focus probs. Metals loop writes: LLM predictions (Chronos/Ministral), per-check signals. Full summary writes: Fibonacci, pivots, Keltner levels.
lessons.fix: Monitor reads agent_summary_compact + agent_summary + metals_signal_log + forecast_predictions every signal check.

lessons.lesson: Emergency sell on disconnect should only sell if position is profitable. Selling at a loss because of a technical disconnect is worse than holding.
lessons.fix: Heartbeat dead + P&L > 0 = sell. Heartbeat dead + P&L < 0 = hold, just stop monitoring.

lessons.lesson: Document lessons as you go, not at end of session. If agent disconnects or context dies, all session knowledge is lost.
lessons.fix: Write to FISHING_PATTERNS.md and session files incrementally during the session.

lessons.lesson: RSI 70 exit threshold too high for ranging days. Silver peaked at RSI 63 with MC at 30% — both signaling reversal but neither hit individual thresholds. Combined RSI >62 + MC <35% should trigger exit in ranging regime.
lessons.fix: Add combined exit: RSI >62 AND MC <35% for LONG (or RSI <38 AND MC >65% for SHORT). This catches peaks/troughs that individual signals miss.

lessons.lesson: RSI entry gate at 50 is too strict for ranging markets. Missed a $0.90 silver drop because RSI was 49 (1 point below threshold). That would have been +168 SEK on TURBO S.
lessons.fix: Remove RSI gate from entry. Use only both-loops-agree + MC stable 2x. RSI is too noisy around 50 to be a useful gate.

lessons.lesson: TURBO instruments (7-15x leverage) with 0.2-0.3% AVA spread are better than BULL/BEAR X10 SG (0.6% spread) for high-conviction trades. Same leverage, half the cost.
lessons.fix: Use TURBO L AVA 491 (9.8x) and TURBO S AVA 544 (9.9x) as default high-leverage instruments. BULL/BEAR X5 for normal trades.

lessons.lesson: When combined exit fires (RSI 63 + MC 26%), that IS the entry signal for the opposite direction. We sold BULL at the peak but then waited 20 min to enter SHORT. Should reduce cooldown to 60s after combined exits.
lessons.fix: 60s cooldown after combined exit (not 120s). The exit signal confidence is high enough to immediately consider the reverse trade.

lessons.lesson: BULL SILVER X5 AVA 4 (ob 1650161) has 4x more volume and 0.2% spread vs AVA 3 (ob 1069606) at 0.8%. Saves ~8 SEK per round trip on 1400 SEK position.
lessons.fix: Updated preferred LONG instrument to AVA 4. Always use fish_instrument_finder.py to check best available before trading.

lessons.lesson: Monitor ignores news and macro events. We entered SHORT on Liberation Day anniversary (tariff safe-haven bid keeping silver high). A simple web search would have revealed this. The news_event signal voted SELL but with empty indicators — no way to see WHY or what event is driving the market.
lessons.fix: Add periodic news check to monitor: (1) read news_event indicators from agent_summary, (2) check econ calendar for today, (3) do a web search for silver/gold headlines every 30 min. Flag any macro event that could override technical signals.

lessons.lesson: Stop writing disposable inline monitoring scripts. We built SmartFishMonitor with ALL data sources (30 signals, cross-assets, LLM, price levels) but kept running throwaway scripts that only read 5 fields. The proper monitor class exists — USE IT.
lessons.fix: Always use SmartFishMonitor class from portfolio/fish_monitor_smart.py. If it needs new features, add them to the class, not to a new inline script.

lessons.lesson: /fin-fish must load and display ALL relevant signals at startup. Specifically for silver: econ_calendar (95%), fear_greed (92%), claude_fundamental (85%), momentum_factors (77%), structure (76%), mean_reversion (73%), fibonacci (68%). Plus cross-asset drivers: DXY (corr -0.65), copper (+0.55), gold (+0.85), oil (+0.30). Plus news_event and econ_calendar events.
lessons.fix: The instrument_profile.py already defines these. Integrate into fin_fish.py startup and into the monitoring display. Every signal check should show trusted signal votes individually, not just aggregate B/S count.

lessons.lesson: Metals loop flipping to BUY while holding SHORT should be an exit warning. We were SHORT and metals loop showed BUY 4B/2S RSI=42 — a clear reversal signal — but the monitor only checked main loop vote margin for exit. Both loops should inform exits.
lessons.fix: Add exit rule: if metals loop action disagrees with position direction for 2+ consecutive checks, trigger exit warning. If both loops disagree, force exit.

lessons.lesson: Check news/events BEFORE entering any trade. We entered SHORT on Liberation Day anniversary without knowing about it. A 30-second web search would have revealed the tariff narrative keeping silver elevated.
lessons.fix: Add periodic web search (every 30min) to monitor. At minimum, check agent_summary news_event and econ_calendar signals and display their indicators/reasoning, not just action.

lessons.lesson: The simple MC + RSI + both-loops-agree setup works for intraday fishing. The aggregate consensus already IS all 30 signals weighted by accuracy. Reading individual trusted signal votes on top is double-counting. The signal_reliability accuracy numbers are measured on 1-DAY horizons — not valid for 30-60 minute trades. Use trusted signal breakdown only for overnight hold/sell decisions where the 1-day timeframe applies.
lessons.fix: Intraday entry/exit: MC + RSI + both loops agree + combined RSI+MC exit. Overnight decision: trusted signal votes (1d accuracy) + focus 1d direction. News/cross-assets: supplementary for both. Do not mix timeframes.

signal_observations.mc_reliability_in_ranging: Low - whipsaws every 1-2 minutes when votes are close
signal_observations.best_entry_signal: Both loops BUY/SELL agreeing + MC stable for 2+ checks
signal_observations.worst_signal: Single MC check in ranging market - too noisy
signal_observations.rsi_useful_range: < 45 for oversold (LONG entry), > 55 for overbought (SHORT entry)
signal_observations.what_worked: MC+RSI+both-loops for entry, combined RSI>62+MC<35% for exit, historical pattern for timing, 2-check MC stability for ranging
signal_observations.what_didnt_work: Individual trusted signal votes for intraday (wrong timeframe), RSI entry gate at 50 (too strict), single MC check (whipsaw), ignoring news/events
signal_observations.overnight_decision_method: Trusted signals (1d accuracy) + focus 1d direction — valid because timeframe matches
